data.biography: Ji Haixing (纪海星) is a Chinese actor.
data.name: Ji Haixing

data.biography: 曾敬驊，臺灣男演員。參加電影《返校》試鏡，從萬人海選當中脫穎而出，成為最具潛力之超新星，於片中飾演學弟「魏仲廷」 ，並入圍第56屆金馬獎最佳新演員和第22屆台北電影獎最佳男主角。2020年，曾敬驊在電影《刻在你心底的名字》中飾演王柏德，連續兩部出演電影皆取得破億票房，堪稱「億萬票房幸運星」。
data.name: 曾敬驊

data.biography:
Tseng Jing-hua (also known as Tseng Ching-hua) is a talented Taiwanese actor born on December 30, 1997, in Dongshan, Yilan, Taiwan. He gained widespread recognition for his role as Birdy in the 2020 film Your Name Engraved Herein, which became the highest-grossing LGBTQ+ film in Taiwan. Tseng also starred in the supernatural horror film Detention (2019), earning a nomination for Best New Performer at the 56th Golden Horse Awards.

He studied at I-Shou University, where he graduated with a degree in Film and Television. Tseng's career includes a variety of roles in both films and television series, showcasing his versatility as an actor. Some of his notable works include the drama series Oh No! Here Comes Trouble (2023) and the movie Eye of the Storm (2023).
data.name: Tseng Jing-Hua

data.biography:
曾敬骅，1997年12月30日出生于台湾宜兰县，毕业于义守大学电影与电视学系，台湾影视男演员。

2017年，主演校园恐怖片《返校》，从而踏进入演艺圈，曾敬骅凭借该片获得第56届金马奖最佳新演员、第22届台北电影节最佳男主角提名。2020年，主演的同性爱情片《刻在你心底的名字》上映。
data.name: 曾敬骅

data.biography: Tăng Kính Hoa là diễn viên người Đài Loan đến từ Nghi Lan. Anh được biết đến vai Birdy trong bộ phim đồng tính Cái tên khắc sâu trong tim người của Đài Loan, hiện đang giữ kỉ lục phim LGBT có doanh thu cao nhất tại Đài Loan.
曾敬驊，台灣男演員。參加電影《返校》試鏡，從萬人海選當中脱穎而出，成為最具潛力之超新星，於片中飾演學弟「魏仲廷」 ，並入圍第 56 屆金馬獎最佳新演員和第 22 屆台北電影獎最佳男主角。2020 年，曾敬驊在電影《刻在你心底的名字》中飾演王柏德，聯續兩部出演電影皆取得破億票房，堪稱「億萬票房幸運星」。
data.name: 曾敬驊

data.biography:
Pääru Oja (s. 16. toukokuuta 1989 Tallinna, Viron sosialistinen neuvostotasavalta) on virolainen näyttelijä.

Oja valmistui näyttelijäksi vuonna 2012 Viron musiikki- ja teatteriakatemian teatterikoulusta, minkä jälkeen hän on toiminut Viron draamateatterin näyttelijänä.

Teatteriroolien lisäksi hän on esiintynyt muun muassa elokuvassa 1944.

Pääru Oja (born May 16, 1989) is an Estonian stage, film, voice, and television actor.

Pääru Oja was born in Tallinn, the youngest of two sons. His father is actor Tõnu Oja and his older brother is Estonian Theatre Festival CEO and theatre manager Kaarel Oja, who is married to actress Ursula Ratasepp. His uncle is actor, director and theatre instructor Rein Oja. He attended primary and secondary schools in Tallinn before being accepted to the Estonian Academy of Music and Theatre in Tallinn, where he graduated from in 2012 under course supervisor Elmo Nüganen. Oja's diploma roles included Father of Toulon in Peter Barnes' Red Noses (2010), Joseph Wykowski in Neil Simon's Biloxi Blues, and Argante in Molière's The Imaginary Invalid (2011). Among his graduating classmates were: Henrik Kalmet, Karl-Andreas Kalmet, Priit Pius, Märt Pius, Liis Lass, Piret Krumm, Maiken Schmidt, and Kaspar Velberg.

Pääru Oja, 16 Mayıs 1989 tarihinde Tallinn, Estonya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Sanatçı bir aileden gelen Oja, ünlü Estonyalı aktör Tõnu Oja'nın oğludur. Bu köklü sanatsal miras, onun kariyer yolculuğunu şekillendiren en önemli unsurlardan biri olmuştur. 2012 yılında Estonya Müzik ve Tiyatro Akademisi'nin Sahne Sanatları bölümünden mezun olan Oja, mezuniyetinin ardından prestijli Estonya Drama Tiyatrosu'nun kadrosuna katılarak tiyatro sahnelerinde yeteneğini sergilemeye başlamıştır.

Sinema dünyasındaki ilk büyük çıkışını, Elmo Nüganen'in yönettiği ve Estonya'nın Oscar adayı olan 2015 yapımı savaş draması "1944" filmiyle gerçekleştirdi. Bu filmde canlandırdığı sıhhiyeci Elmar karakteri, savaşın trajedisi içinde insanlığını korumaya çalışan genç bir askerin portresini başarıyla çizerek dikkatleri üzerine çekti. Bu rol, onun Estonya sinemasında yükselen bir yıldız olarak tanınmasını sağladı.

Kariyerindeki en önemli başrol performanslarından birini, gerçek olaylardan esinlenen 2018 yapımı suç draması "Mihkel" filminde sergiledi. İzlanda ve Estonya ortak yapımı olan bu filmde, daha iyi bir hayat umuduyla yola çıkıp trajik bir ihanete uğrayan Mihkel karakterine hayat verdi. Oja, bu roldeki yoğun ve duygusal performansıyla dramatik oyunculuk gücünü kanıtladı. Ayrıca 2020 yapımı casusluk gerilimi "O2" (Dawn of War) ve aile filmi "Hõlma all" (Christmas in the Jungle) gibi farklı türlerdeki yapımlarda yer alarak çok yönlülüğünü gösterdi.

Pääru Oja'nın uluslararası arenada geniş kitlelerce tanınmasını sağlayan ve kariyerinde bir dönüm noktası olan proje, Netflix'in dünya çapında popüler olan tarihi aksiyon dizisi "Vikings: Valhalla" (2022) oldu. Dizide Leif Eriksson'un sadık yoldaşı Arne Gormsson karakterini canlandıran Oja, Viking savaşçısı rolüyle fiziksel aksiyon sahnelerindeki başarısını ve karizmatik ekran duruşunu global izleyiciye kanıtladı. Bu başarıyı, 2023 yapımı distopik bilimkurgu filmi "Last Sentinel" (Son Nöbetçi) takip etti. Kate Bosworth ile birlikte rol aldığı bu filmde canlandırdığı Baines karakteri, onun İngilizce konuşulan uluslararası yapımlardaki yerini sağlamlaştırdı. Oja, hem yerel sinemadaki derinlikli rolleri hem de uluslararası projelerdeki başarısıyla Estonya'nın en önemli aktörlerinden biri olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.
Louis George Ashbourne Serkis (born 19 June 2004) is an English actor. He is best known for his role as Alex in the 2019 fantasy adventure film The Kid Who Would Be King.
data.name: Louis Ashbourne Serkis

data.biography:
Louis Ashbourne Serkis (* 19. Juni 2004 in Haringey, London) ist ein britischer Schauspieler. 2016 hatte er sein Debüt in Alice im Wunderland: Hinter den Spiegeln als Young Hatter. Seine erste Hauptrolle spielte Serkis in Wenn du König wärst (2019).

Quelle: Wikipedia

Emily Jordan Osment (born March 10, 1992) is an American actress, singer-songwriter and voice actress born in Los Angeles, California. After working in several television films in her childhood, Osment gained fame for co-starring as Gerti Giggles in Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams and Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over. Osment went on to co-star in the Emmy Award-nominated Disney Channel sitcom Hannah Montana as Lilly Truscott as well as the series movie, Hannah Montana: The Movie. She also starred as Cassie in R. L. Stine's: The Haunting Hour Volume One: Don't Think About It and most recently the Disney Channel Original Movie, Dadnapped as Melissa Morris.

Osment expanded her repertoire into pop music and more recently alternative/indie rock where she has recorded teen pop hits like "I Don't Think About It," "If I Didn't Have You" alongside her Hannah Montana co-star Mitchel Musso, and most recently "Once Upon a Dream."

Osment's debut album, Fight or Flight was released on October 5, 2010 via Wind-up Records, and it features lead single "Let's Be Friends" which was released July 7, 2010.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Emily Osment, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Emily Osment

data.biography: Emily Jordan Osment conocida como Emily Osment es una actriz, cantautora y actriz de voz estadounidense. Después de aparecer en varias películas y series de televisión en su infancia, Osment saltó a la fama por su papel como Gerti Giggles en Spy Kids 2 y Spy Kids 3-D y por ser co-protagonista de la serie original de Disney Channel nominada al Emmy, Hannah Montana como Lilly Truscott, así como la película de la serie, Hannah Montana: La película. También interpretó a Cassie Keller en The Haunting Hour: Don't Think About It y a Melissa Morris en la película Dadnapped de Disney Channel. Desde el 2014 hasta 2018 interpreto a Gabi Diamond en la serie Young & Hungry

艾米丽·乔丹·奥斯门特（Emily Jordan Osment，1992年3月10日-），美国女演员、创作歌手、配音演员，出生于加利福尼亚州洛杉矶。在童年时期出演了几部电视电影后，奥斯门特因在《间谍小子 2：失落的梦想之岛》和《间谍小子 3-D：游戏结束》中共同主演 Gerti Giggles 而声名鹊起。奥斯门特继续在获得艾美奖提名的迪斯尼频道情景喜剧《汉娜·蒙大拿》中饰演莉莉·特鲁斯科特，以及系列电影《汉娜·蒙大拿：电影》。她还出演了 RL Stine 的 Cassie Eight： The Haunting Hour Volume One： Don't Think About It，以及最近的迪士尼频道原创电影 Dadnapped 饰演 Melissa Morris。

Osment 将她的曲目扩展到流行音乐和最近的另类/独立摇滚，在那里她与她的 Hannah Montana 联合主演 Mitchel Musso 一起录制了青少年流行歌曲，如“I Don't Think About It”、“If I Didn't Have You”，以及最近的“Once Upon a Dream”。

Osment的首张专辑《Fight or Flight》于2010年10月5日通过Wind-up Records发行，主打单曲《Let's Be Friends》于2010年7月7日发行。
data.name: 艾米丽·奥斯门特

data.biography:
Emily Jordan Osment (ur. 10 marca 1992) jest amerykańską aktorką, piosenkarką-autorką tekstów i aktorką głosową urodzoną w Los Angeles w Kalifornii. Po występie w kilku filmach telewizyjnych w dzieciństwie, Osment zyskała sławę dzięki roli Gerti Giggles w Mali agenci 2: Wyspa marzeń i Mali agenci 3D: Trójwymiarowy odjazd. Następnie Osment zagrała rolę Lilly Truscott w nominowanym do nagrody Emmy sitcomie Disney Channel Hannah Montana, a także w filmie serialowym Hannah Montana: Film Zagrała również Cassie w R. L. Stine's: Godziny strachu: Nie myśl o tym, a ostatnio w oryginalnym filmie Disney Channel Tatastrofa jako Melissa Morris.

Osment rozszerzyła swój repertuar o muzykę pop, a ostatnio alternatywny/indie rock, gdzie nagrała hity popowe dla nastolatków, takie jak „I Don't Think About It”, „If I Didn't Have You” u boku swojego kolegi z Hannah Montana, Mitchela Musso, a ostatnio „Once Upon a Dream”.

Debiutancki album Osment, Fight or Flight, został wydany 5 października 2010 roku przez Wind-up Records i zawiera główny singiel „Let's Be Friends”, który został wydany 7 lipca 2010 roku.

Opis powyżej pochodzi z artykułu Wikipedii Emily Osment, licencjonowanego na podstawie CC-BY-SA, pełna lista współpracowników na Wikipedii.

艾米麗·喬丹·奧斯門特（Emily Jordan Osment，1992 年 3 月 10 日-），美國女演員、創作歌手、配音演員，出生於加利福尼亞州洛杉磯。在童年時期出演了幾部電視電影後，奧斯門特因在《間諜小子 2：失落的夢想之島》和《間諜小子 3 - D：遊戲結束》中共同主演 Gerti Giggles 而聲名鵲起。奧斯門特繼續在獲得艾美獎提名的迪斯尼頻道情景喜劇《漢娜·蒙大拿》中飾演莉莉·特魯斯科特，以及系列電影《漢娜·蒙大拿：電影》。她還出演了 RL Stine 的 Cassie Eight： The Haunting Hour Volume One： Don't Think About It，以及最近的迪士尼頻道原創電影 Dadnapped 飾演 Melissa Morris。

Osment 將她的曲目擴展到流行音樂和最近的另類/獨立搖滾，在那裏她與她的 Hannah Montana 聯合主演 Mitchel Musso 一起錄製了青少年流行歌曲，如“I Don't Think About It”、“If I Didn't Have You”，以及最近的“Once Upon a Dream”。

Osment 的首張專輯《Fight or Flight》於 2010 年 10 月 5 日透過 通過 Wind - up Records 發行，主打單曲《Let's Be Friends》於 2010 年 7 月 7 日發行。
data.name: 艾米麗·奧斯門特
